permissionDuskMs.description: Ms a pending permission-ask waits before auto-denying.

driftRetentionDays.description: Days of drift-ring samples kept on disk.

fs.description: Filesystem primitive — what humd is allowed to read and write. Built-in MCP tools (Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep/Bash) clamp to these roots. SpawnSpec.cwd must be inside one of them.

path.description: Absolute path or ~-relative. Tilde expanded against $HOME at load time.

mode.description: rw — read + write tools allowed. ro — Read/Glob/Grep allowed, Write/Edit refused.

denied.description: Hard blacklist. Any path under a denied prefix is refused even if it sits inside a root. Tilde expanded.

nest.description: The pool that hosts cells. One nest per humd.

maxProcs.description: Hard cap on concurrent cells. See nest::NestHealth for the pressure tiers it feeds.

idleThresholdMs.description: Ms after last activity before a cell is considered idle and eligible for eviction.

default.description: Hive name to route to when a chi:prompt doesn't pin one. Must appear in `hives`.

hives.description: Per-hive config. Key = hive name (claude-cli, claude-repl, future kinds). Value's shape is owned by the hive's worker-bee crate. Missing block = Default.

cliPath.description: Override the binary location. NOTE: humd currently resolves the binary from the CLAUDE_CLI_PATH env, not this field.

defaultModel.description: Intended default model for this hive. NOTE: humd currently picks the model from the prompt's modelId and the CLAUDE_MODELS env, not this field.

ccFlags.description: Env overrides spread onto every spawn AFTER the worker's defaults.

budget.description: Soft caps the budget tracker enforces. None = no cap.
